creator: cjh@kr.FreeBSD.org
text:
Big update of Korean Netscape 4.x ports. It includes
  Netscape Communicator 4.08 (update)
  Netscape Navigator 4.08 (update)
  Netscape Communicator 4.51 (new)
  Netscape Navigator 4.51 (new)
  Netscape Communicator 4.6 (new)
  Netscape Navigator 4.6 (new)

Just like ja-netscape ports, it depends primarily on 4.08 ports and each
others(e.g -navigator depend on -communicator). So I send them all at once 
instead of separating each ports.

How-To-Repeat: 
Build it with a recent FreeBSD system.
